text.title: Methodologies Index Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Methodologies Index. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: INDEX.xml lists 47 methodologies flat with no <groups>.
antipattern.fix: Cluster into 3-8 groups; pick group labels that are mutually exclusive.

antipattern.root-cause: Editor added rows but forgot to bump count.

antipattern.fix: Rewrite as 'Generates a 1-page risk register with P10/P50/P90 likelihood + mitigation owner.'
